steps.t: You successfully engaged the enemy at Dûl Zidur and were issued a dire warning by the cultists there. Ashâmi and Raphûz visited Numûru upon their retu…
Ashâmi and Raphûz asked you to make your way to Numûru and explain you also heard the warning from the cultist. You can find him at his post in Urmâkh…
Numûru was quick to dismiss the possible threat for the existential threat he can see. You should return to Ashâmi and Raphûz at their home in Urmâkh …
